context: Tests whether HealthKit background delivery guidance covers entitlement, observer lifecycle, completion handling, frequency limits, and device testing.

checklist.name: Background entitlement
checklist.description: Requires the HealthKit Background Delivery capability or com.apple.developer.healthkit.background-delivery entitlement.

checklist.name: Launch-time observer setup
checklist.description: Says observer queries should be set up as the app launches rather than only when a screen appears.

checklist.name: Same sample type
checklist.description: Pairs enableBackgroundDelivery with an executed HKObserverQuery for the same sample type.

checklist.name: Completion handler
checklist.description: Requires calling the observer query completion handler even on failures and notes that missing completions can delay or stop future updates.

checklist.name: Frequency limits
checklist.description: Explains that requested frequency is a maximum and that some types, such as iOS step count, may be capped hourly.

checklist.name: Device testing
checklist.description: States that HealthKit background delivery is not supported on Simulator and must be tested on device.
